hooks.command: bash -c 'if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE "git\s+(push\s+.*(-f|--force)|reset\s+--hard|clean\s+-f|checkout\s+--\s+\.|branch\s+-D)"; then echo "BLOCKED: Destructive git operation. Use a safer alternative or get explicit user confirmation." >&2; exit 2; fi; if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE "git\s+add\s+.*(\.(env|pem|key)|credentials|secret)"; then echo "BLOCKED: Attempting to stage sensitive file. Never commit secrets — use .env.example or environment variables instead." >&2; exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".file_path // empty"); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "(\.pem|\.key|credentials|secret)"; then echo "BLOCKED: Writing to sensitive file ($FILE). Use environment variables or a secrets manager instead." >&2; exit 2; fi; CONTENT=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".content // .new_string // empty"); if [ -n "$CONTENT" ] && echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE "AKIA[A-Z0-9]|sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]|ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]|-----BEGIN.*PRIVATE KEY"; then echo "BLOCKED: Content contains what appears to be a secret (AWS key, API key, or private key). Use environment variables instead." >&2; exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".file_path // empty"); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json|css|md)$"; then npx prettier --write "$FILE" >/dev/null 2>/dev/null; fi; true'
bash -c 'if [ -f tsconfig.json ]; then OUTPUT=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1); if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "$OUTPUT" | tail -20 >&2; exit 2; fi; fi'
bash -c 'if [ -f package.json ] && jq -e ".scripts.lint" package.json >/dev/null 2>&1; then OUTPUT=$(npm run lint 2>&1); if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "$OUTPUT" | tail -20 >&2; exit 2; fi; fi'
